metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product capabilities for the Cloud Data and AI Platform domain.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

capabilities.name: Unify Governed Enterprise Data
capabilities.description: Help enterprises ingest, catalog, govern, and query trusted data across business domains.
outcomes: Faster time to governed production value
Higher workload retention and platform consolidation

flows.title: Unify Governed Enterprise Data
flows.description: Help enterprises ingest, catalog, govern, and query trusted data across business domains.

steps.title: Assess current state
keyFacts: Teams need clear workload, data, and risk context before choosing a platform path.
painPoints: Unclear ownership and fragmented tooling slow migration and production adoption.

dependencies.name: Data Ingestion Fabric
dependencies.description: Primary enabling brick for this step.
dependencies.how: Supports initial assessment and path selection.

steps.title: Configure governed platform
keyFacts: Security, policy, cost, and catalog controls must be active before broad usage.
painPoints: AI pilots stall when controls are bolted on after teams begin using sensitive data.

dependencies.name: Data Ingestion Fabric
dependencies.description: Supporting brick for governed platform configuration.

dependencies.name: Lakehouse Storage and Table Format
dependencies.description: Supporting brick for governed platform configuration.

dependencies.name: Cloud Data Warehouse
dependencies.description: Supporting brick for governed platform configuration.

steps.title: Operate and improve
keyFacts: Usage, cost, quality, and reliability signals determine whether workloads expand.
painPoints: Customers lose trust when production incidents, surprise bills, or data-quality failures are not visible.

dependencies.name: Data Quality and Observability
dependencies.description: Operational support brick for this capability.
dependencies.how: Closes the loop from launch to durable adoption.

externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.interface: SSO, private network, source connectors, marketplace procurement
externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.description: Provide enterprise context and source data needed to activate cloud data and AI workloads.
